title: Sistema KLIP IT Food Storage Container | 3 L | Stackable Food Prep Container with Airtight Lids | BPA-Free | Blue Clips | 1 Count
features: Extra-large food storage container ideal for a variety of foods and ingredients
Lid with easy-locking clips and extended flexible seal helps keep food fresher for longer
Modular stacking design and rectangular shape helps save valuable space
Dishwasher (top rack), microwave (without lid), fridge and freezer safe
Designed and made in New Zealand, phthalate and BPA free
description: From the manufacturer Stackable, versatile food storage containers to make life easier The Sistema KLIP IT range is versatile, durable and hard wearing, with solutions to solve all your food storage needs. Featuring easy to use locking clips plus flexible seal, food stays fresher for longer. The modular stacking shapes of the Sistema KLIP IT rectangular range ensures the most efficient use of space in the fridge, freezer and pantry. It is ideal for organising today's busy kitchen and provides one of the worlds most comprehensive food storage solutions. In addition to the rectangular range we offer a range round containers, split compartment containers and utility containers to suit all your kitchen storage requirements from juice to cereals to salads and cold cuts. Reduce the amount of waste sent to landfills by using reusable storage containers Store leftovers for an easy quick meal, or freeze for another day Use for batch cooking and portion control Storage solutions to suit all your kitchen storage needs Why You'll Love It Space Saving Stacking System A range of different shapes and sizes ensures the most efficient use of space. Easy Locking Clips Sistema's patented easy locking clips and flexible seal helps food stay fresher for longer. Microwave Safe, Dishwasher Safe & Freezer Safe For easy clean up, Sistema KLIP IT food storage containers and lids can go in the dishwasher (top rack). They can also be stored in the freezer and easily microwaved to defrost and reheat. Made in New Zealand Made in New Zealand from Phthalate free and BPA free materials.* * Tested in a Swiss-based accredited laboratory. (Test Report # 2017L41815/1, issued in 2018).
